meaning: vt.寮勪贡,鎵撲贡,鎵撴壈,鎵颁贡v.鎵颁贡
examples: I didn't like to disturb you.
Don't disturb Jane, she's studying for her exams.
If you get up early, try not to disturb everyone else.
At the bottom, Mr Cameron encountered incredibly fine silt, which he had to be careful not to disturb.
Sometimes that frustration escalates into "air rage" incidents that still disturb the friendly skies post-September 11.
